descs.desc:
If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 2 or more, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count

If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 2 or more, Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count

If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, Coin Power +1 for every 2 Speed difference (Max 2)
[WinDuel] Gain +2 [Breath] Count

If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's by 2 or more, Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Consume 10 [Breath] Count. Gain [Breath] equal to [Breath] Count consumed.
[WinDuel] If this unit conducted a [OneOnOneDuel] with the target Slot's Attack Skill, inflict 1 [Vulnerable] On Hit (Twice per turn)

If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, Coin Power +1 for every 2 Speed difference (Max 3)
[WinDuel] Consume 10 [Breath] Count. Gain [Breath] equal to [Breath] Count consumed. Against targets with [DuelDeclaration_Sinclair], gain [Breath] equal to ([Breath] Count consumed x 2) instead
[WinDuel] If this unit conducted a [OneOnOneDuel] with the target Slot's Attack Skill, inflict 1 [Vulnerable] On Hit (Twice per turn)

1100801.name: Slumbering Bloodthirst
1100801.desc: Turn End: Gain +2 Max Speed next turn for every 5 [Breath] Count (Max 6)

1100811.name: Slumbering Bloodthirst
1100811.desc:
Turn End: Gain +2 Max Speed next turn for every 5 [Breath] Count (Max 6)
Combat Start: If Speed of all allies is higher than Speed of all enemies, gain 1 [PenetrateDamageUp]

1100821.name: Too Slow
1100821.desc: The fastest ally, On Evade, gains 1 [Agility] next turn (Max 5)
